applicant_name.label: Full Name
applicant_name.helpText: Enter your name exactly as it appears on your PAN card

date_of_birth.label: Date of Birth
date_of_birth.helpText: Applicant must be between 21 and 65 years of age

pan_number.label: PAN Number
pan_number.helpText: 10-character Permanent Account Number issued by the Income Tax Department

aadhaar_number.label: Aadhaar Number
aadhaar_number.helpText: Your 12-digit Aadhaar number as issued by UIDAI

loan_type.label: Loan Type
loan_type.helpText: Select the type of loan you are applying for

loan_amount.label: Loan Amount (₹)
loan_amount.helpText: Minimum ₹10,000 — Maximum based on your income eligibility

annual_income.label: Annual Income (₹)
annual_income.helpText: Your total gross income before tax deductions

employer_name.label: Employer Name
employer_name.helpText: Enter the full legal name of your employer

property_value.label: Property Market Value (₹)
property_value.helpText: Current market value of the property as assessed by a registered valuer

property_address.label: Property Address
property_address.helpText: Include flat/plot number, street, locality, city, state and PIN code

co_applicant_name.label: Co-Applicant Name (Optional)
co_applicant_name.helpText: Adding a co-applicant may improve your loan eligibility

kyc_consent.label: I authorise the bank to perform KYC verification and access my credit bureau report
kyc_consent.helpText: This is required to process your loan application

declaration_consent.label: I declare that all information provided is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge
declaration_consent.helpText: False declaration may result in rejection and legal action

errors.applicant_name.minLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.applicant_name.invalidChars: Name can only contain letters and spaces
errors.date_of_birth.minAge: Applicant must be at least 21 years old
errors.date_of_birth.maxAge: Applicant must be below 65 years of age
errors.pan_number.invalidFormat: PAN must be in the format AAAAA9999A
errors.pan_number.invalidPan: PAN number could not be verified. Please check and retry
errors.aadhaar_number.invalidLength: Aadhaar number must be exactly 12 digits
errors.aadhaar_number.invalidChecksum: Aadhaar number appears invalid. Please check and retry
errors.loan_amount.exceedsEligibility: Loan amount cannot exceed 60× your annual income
errors.loan_tenure_months.homeLoanMin: Home loans require a minimum tenure of 12 months
errors.loan_tenure_months.personalLoanMax: Personal loans have a maximum tenure of 60 months
errors.employer_name.requiredForSalaried: Employer name is required for salaried applicants
errors.property_value.requiredForHomeLoan: Property value is required for home loan applications
errors.property_value.belowLoanAmount: Property value must be at least 1.2× the loan amount
errors.property_address.requiredForHomeLoan: Property address is required for home loan applications
errors.co_applicant_pan.requiredWithName: PAN is required when a co-applicant name is provided
errors.co_applicant_pan.sameAsPrimary: Co-applicant PAN cannot be the same as the primary applicant's PAN
errors.kyc_consent.required: You must authorise KYC verification to proceed
errors.declaration_consent.required: You must accept the declaration to submit your application
errors.eligibility.incomeInsufficient: Based on your income, you do not meet the minimum eligibility criteria
errors.tenure_capped_personal: Tenure has been adjusted to the maximum of 60 months for personal loans
errors.nominee_name.minLength: Nominee name must be at least 2 characters
errors.nominee_name.requiredForHomeLoan: Nominee name is required for home loan applications
